message:
test(e2e): add 28 migration quality gate tests (ft-e34d9.10.6.4)

End-to-end scripts exercising the complete migration verification pipeline:
- Full gate pass with artifact schema validation
- Failure injection for each mandatory artifact type
- Content and schema validation failure paths
- Recovery scenarios (missing→complete, failing→fixed)
- Partially complete states for optional artifacts
- Zero-artifact total failure case
- Manifest structure validation (ordering, coverage, gate steps)
- Contract field validation (required fields, proof statements)
- JSON schema structure verification for reports and manifests
- Cross-module integration (surface guard + migration gate)
- Async runtime validation during gate evaluation
- Concurrent gate evaluation stress test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
